scope: v1 contract consumer readiness handoff integrity
summary: v228 locks the v225 readiness handoff integrity boundary: digest evidence, guard evidence, derived checks, future receipt exclusion, and all execution-denied flags remain exact.
guards: digestEvidence equals the frozen Java v220 digest evidence list
handoffGuardEvidence equals the four v221-v224 digest guard evidence receipts
handoffChecks keep digest version, digest count, guard count, GET-only, upstream-denied, and no-process-control checks
v226-v228 handoff guard receipts do not appear inside the frozen v225 handoff
blocked operations remain write-routing, active-shard-router, credential-value-read, raw-endpoint-parse, managed-audit-connection, deployment-or-rollback, and node-start-or-stop-java-or-mini-kv
